title: 9 Effective Herbal Essential Oils for Smokers with Dry Nose
description: Calendula officinalis essential oils, also known as pot marigold oil, can provide relief for dry nose due to its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains constituents like triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and sesquiterpenes, which help to calm and protect the nasal mucous membranes. The sesquiterpenes, in particular, have been shown to have anti-inflammatory effects, reducing swelling and redness associated with dry nose.  To use Calendula officinalis essential oil...
